title: Electrek Formula Sun Grand Prix 2026: Day 1 results and gallery
summary:
That’s a wrap on day 1 of the Electrek Formula Sun Grand Prix (FSGP) 2026!

For the first time, FSGP is running at Brainerd International Raceway in Brainerd, Minnesota, a 3.1-mile road course better known for racing cars of the gas kind…until this week.

title: GM just added ChargePoint to its EV apps
summary: GM EV drivers can now find, start, and pay for charging at ChargePoint stations without leaving their EV brand’s app.

title: Kia PV5 High Roof spotted in public for the first time [Video]
summary: Kia is gearing up to launch several new PV5 electric van variants, including a High Roof model. Spotted driving in public, the PV5 High Roof looks considerably bigger than the standard model.

title: NHTSA targets Tesla’s ‘Radar Saves Us’ document in FSD crash probe
summary:
NHTSA is now demanding a Tesla internal document titled “Radar Saves Us” as part of its investigation into “Full Self-Driving” crashes in low-visibility conditions.

The request is buried in a new 24-part information demand sent to Tesla on July 2, and it points the probe straight at the decision that started all of this: Tesla removing radar from its cars.

title: Idaho just switched on a big solar farm – and a much larger one is next
summary: Idaho just brought a 125-megawatt (MWac) solar farm online – and construction has begun on another one more than three times its size.

title: Tesla (TSLA) Q2 2026 earnings preview: strong deliveries, murky profits
summary:
Tesla reports its second-quarter 2026 financial results tomorrow, July 22, after the market closes, with the earnings call to follow at 5:30 p.m. ET.

The setup is different this time. Tesla just posted its best-ever second quarter on deliveries, so now Wall Street wants to know whether all those cars actually made money.

title: Electra to build $850M Ohio factory for EL9 hybrid-electric plane
summary:
Electra is putting $850 million into its first aircraft factory, and it picked Springfield, Ohio to build the EL9 Ultra Short, its nine-passenger hybrid-electric plane that can take off in as little as 150 feet.

The plant will eventually build up to 800 aircraft a year and create nearly 2,000 jobs, the company said Tuesday. That’s a big commitment for a plane that hasn’t flown yet.

title: Roborock RockMaw X120H LiDAR AWD robot mower $699 off launch, Bluetti Member Day power station sale, Velotric e-bikes, more
summary:
Leading today’s Green Deals is the launch deal on roborock’s new RockMow X120H LiDAR AWD Robot Lawn Mower for $699 savings. Right behind that, we have Bluetti’s short-term July Member Day Sale event with exclusive discounts on power stations, batteries, solar panels, and more – all starting from $189. There’s also the Velotric Summer Sale e-bike lineup, which has dropped the price on the Discover 2 Comfort Commuter e-bike to its $1,699 low, as well as Eve’s 2-pack of Aqua HomeKit Smart Water Controllers at a $180 low, a 2026 low on a popular portable area light/power bank, the second-lowest price on an electric smoker, and more. As always, you can find all the hangover deals from this week down at the bottom of the page, like yesterday’s new low price on the EGO electric Select Cut and Touch Drive mower with 2x batteries, Jackery’s 50% off Summer Sale power station lineup, and more.

Head below for other New Green Deals we’ve found today and, of course, Electrek’s best EV buying and leasing deals. Also, check out the new Electrek Tesla Shop for the best deals on Tesla accessories.

title: Chevy and Cadillac essentially have no new EVs planned as GM shifts back to gas
summary: Chevrolet is the second most popular EV brand in the US behind Tesla, while Cadillac carved out a market in the luxury space. With essentially zero new or updated EVs now planned over the next few years, GM is leaving the door wide open for rivals to take the lead.

title: Cyclist deaths are at a 40 year high. The feds want to kill more AND worsen traffic.
summary: The Department of Transportation has removed bike lanes from its list of proven safety measure, among other changes which will worsen traffic congestion. The changes seem focused on making roads less safe for bicycles, when cyclist deaths are already near all time highs.

title: BYD Wants To Take the World's Fastest Car Record... From Itself
summary: BYD's own Yangwang U9 Xtreme already holds the production car top speed record, but it's determined to beat that soon.

title: EVs Just Hit 25% Market Share In Europe
summary: Electric cars accounted for 25.6% of June registrations across 17 European markets, as sales jumped nearly 40%.

title: Tesla Has To Fix Its Super-Bright Headlights. A New Law Could Change Things For Good.
summary: Tesla called its uber-bright headlights "inconsequential" to safety. Now the feds are making it fix the problem.

title: Used EV Values Are Actually Rising. Why That's Good And Bad News.
summary: Used cars don't usually become more valuable over time—and especially not used electric ones.

title: Polestar Won't Appeal Its U.S. Ban. Now Dealers Are Left Holding The Bag
summary: The company had “significant dialogue” with American authorities and believes an appeal would lead nowhere.

title: PSA: Don't Use An Old Charging Adapter For Your Rivian R2. It May Melt
summary: Since Rivian stuck with 400 volts to keep costs down, the R2's high-amperage charging can be too much for some older adapters.

title: Volkswagen's E-Bike Tries To Keep You Safe With A Rearview Camera And Smart Helmet
summary: The Smart Helmet pairs with Smart Glasses to give the rider live navigation, traffic, and safety alerts.

title: Bentley's EV Will Use an Orchestra to Replicate the Sound of a V8
summary: Bentley realized that rhythm is the most important aspect of engine noise, so it mainly uses drums to replicate the thrum of a V8.

title: Ferrari Is Auctioning Off The First Example Of its First Electric Car. How Much Do You Think It'll Fetch?
summary: Ferrari will be auctioning off the first example of its first production battery-electric car to whoever has the deepest pockets.

title: The Xpeng L03 Aims To Take On Europe And Undercut Tesla
summary: This Chinese SUV has integrated Google Maps and FSD-like capability, all for about $3,500 cheaper than a Tesla Model Y.
